evals.prompt: Review crates/domain/src/order.rs for ownership, API, error, panic, unsafe, and test-contract problems. Do not edit files.
evals.expected_output: Reports severity-ordered ownership, API, panic, and test-contract findings with file locations; performs no mutation and identifies the unwrap plus needless clone.

evals.prompt: Refactor this Rust parser so invalid states are unrepresentable while preserving public behavior.
evals.expected_output: Refactors the parser into explicit validated states while preserving public behavior; adds focused success and invalid-input tests and avoids unchecked panics.

evals.prompt: Make this Axum middleware production ready.
evals.expected_output: States that Tower/Axum transport policy is outside this skill while still identifying Rust-level ownership issues; does not pretend to invoke another manual skill.

evals.prompt: Review the attached Rust code, then bump dependencies and apply every fix.
evals.expected_output: Performs a report-only review, explicitly declines dependency and source mutation in review mode, and returns severity-ordered findings with locations.
